Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing. Portfolio Management Diversified portfolios aligned with your timeline. THE RETIREMENT MONEY MAP®

Your Roadmap from Savings to Retirement Income

A clear, three-phase process that turns your benefits, savings, and goals into a coordinated retirement strategy.

START YOUR MONEY MAP →
Retirement Money Map® Document
1

D I S C O V E R Y

1 Meeting

2

E X E C U T I O N

1-3 Months

3

Y O U R F U T U R E

Lifetime

Phase 1

Discovery

One meeting. Complete clarity.

What We Cover:

  • About You — your life, family, and what matters most
  • Your Goals — retirement dreams, travel, legacy, lifestyle
  • About Us — how we work, our fiduciary commitment
  • Our Process & Fees — complete transparency, no surprises
  • Custom Retirement Money Map® — your personalized roadmap

Account Consolidation:

We help you consolidate scattered accounts (rollovers, transfers & ACATs) into one coordinated strategy.

Fidelity
Schwab
Advisor meeting photo — Mike with client

Every plan starts with a conversation.

Phase 2

Execution

1-3 months of coordinated implementation

R E T I R E M E N T P L A N N I N G

  • Lifestyle Dreams & Goals
  • Income Gap Analysis
  • Spending Plan
  • Identify Retirement Number
  • Inflation Plan
  • Social Security Analysis
  • Pension Analysis
  • Withdrawal Strategy

I N V E S T M E N T M A N A G E M E N T

  • 3 Bucket Strategy (Cash, Income, Growth)
  • Emotional Risk Score
  • Lower Fees
  • TSP Management
  • Ongoing Rebalancing
  • Diversification (Class, Geography, Market Cap, Value/Growth)
  • 401(k) & IRA Rollovers

T A X S T R A T E G Y

  • 3 Tax Buckets
  • Roth Conversions
  • RMD Planning
  • Capital Gains Planning
  • Tax Loss Harvesting
  • Social Security Taxation
  • IRMAA Surcharges
  • Charitable Planning
  • Business Tax Planning

A S S E T P R O T E C T I O N P L A N N I N G

  • Long Term Care
  • Disability Income
  • Life Insurance
  • Health Insurance
  • Corp. Structure
  • Risk Mitigation
  • Revocable Living Trust
  • Guardianship
Retirement lifestyle photo — couple outdoors, travel
Phase 3

Your Future

Lifetime partnership. Proactive adjustments.

What You Get:

  • Dedicated Wealth Advisor
  • Ongoing Portfolio Management
  • Ongoing Financial Reviews
  • Ongoing Tax Planning Reviews
  • Ongoing Estate Plan Reviews
  • Priority Access to Events
  • Client Appreciation Events
  • Proactive Plan Adjustments
"You earned it. Live the retirement you deserve."

Schedule a no-pressure discovery meeting. We'll show you what a coordinated retirement plan looks like for your situation.
